mapper.sql: id, user_id, username, operation, module, description, target_id, ip, trace_id, status, error_msg, duration, created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO audit_log (user_id, username, operation, module, description, target_id, ip, trace_id, status, error_msg, duration, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{username}, #{operation}, #{module}, #{description}, #{targetId}, #{ip}, #{traceId}, #{status}, #{errorMsg}, #{duration}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT FROM audit_log WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM audit_log WHERE created_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM audit_log WHERE operation = #{operation} ORDER BY created_at DESC
